offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, missed maintenance schedules cause tenant complaints. We provide timely notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Missed maintenance schedules lead to tenant complaints and potential property damage.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management advice
